ddls:
CREATE TABLE "supercomputers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supercomputer */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the supercomputer in terms of performance */,
  "system" TEXT /* Name of the supercomputer system */,
  "cores" INTEGER /* Number of processing cores */,
  "rmax" REAL /* Maximum achieved performance (TFlop/s) */,
  "rpeak" REAL /* Peak theoretical performance (TFlop/s) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption (kW) */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Total memory (GB) */,
  "processor_type" TEXT /* Type of processor used */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the supercomputer */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the manufacturers table */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the institutions table */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supercomputers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supercomputers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the supercomputer manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Manufacturer's website URL */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Institution's website URL */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supercomputer_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "supercomputer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the supercomputers table */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the supercomputer at the time of recording */,
  "rmax" REAL /* Maximum achieved performance (TFlop/s) at the time of recording */,
  "rpeak" REAL /* Peak theoretical performance (TFlop/s) at the time of recording */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption (kW) at the time of recording */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the record was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supercomputer_history_supercomputer_id FOREIGN KEY ("supercomputer_id") REFERENCES supercomputers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "supercomputer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the supercomputers table */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the supercomputer in the benchmark */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_supercomputer_id FOREIGN KEY ("supercomputer_id") REFERENCES supercomputers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, moderator, or regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_submissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "supercomputer_name" TEXT /* Name of the supercomputer submitted by the user */,
  "cores" INTEGER /* Number of processing cores */,
  "rmax" REAL /* Maximum achieved performance (TFlop/s) */,
  "rpeak" REAL /* Peak theoretical performance (TFlop/s) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption (kW) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
